description: The Honda SP 125 is a premium commuter motorcycle designed for daily riders who want efficiency without compromising on style. With its advanced engine technology and modern features, it sets a new benchmark in the 125cc commuter segment.
cons: No rear disc brake as standard

common_problems.solution: Clean and lubricate chain every 500 km

common_problems.cause: Stock seat not designed for long rides
common_problems.solution: Add seat cushion or upgrade seat

avoid: Cheap no-name helmets (even if ISI marked)
Overpriced alloy wheels for a commuter
buying_advice.oem_vs_aftermarket: For the SP 125, aftermarket accessories offer better value since the bike itself is budget-focused. OEM parts are overpriced for what you get. Stick to reputed aftermarket brands.
money_saving_tips: Skip fancy accessories — the SP 125 is built for utility, not show
Buy during festive season sales (Diwali, Republic Day) for 15-30% discounts
Start with essentials, add accessories as you identify actual needs
Check Amazon, Flipkart, and local dealers — prices vary significantly
common_mistakes: Buying a cheap helmet to save ₹200 — your head is worth more
Skipping regular chain maintenance — it is cheap insurance
Using car shampoo on the bike — use motorcycle-specific products
Not reading the owner's manual for service intervals
